name: flexiberry
description: Flexiberry is an API testing framework designed to create test suites for various use cases, including functional testing, load testing, security testing, API data comparison, API response validation, API unit testing, and end-to-end testing

scripts.build:extension: pnpm --filter @flexiberry/berrycore build && pnpm --filter @flexiberry/language-server build && pnpm --filter vscode-berry-extension build
scripts.package:extension: pnpm run build:extension && pnpm --filter vscode-berry-extension package
scripts.build:apps: pnpm run build:app && pnpm run build:doc && pnpm run build:website
scripts.dev:app: pnpm --filter @flexiberry/berrycore dev && pnpm --filter @flexiberry/cli dev && pnpm --filter @flexiberry/vscode-berry-extension dev

author: rinturajc@gmail.com
